ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-13-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss
Off Calendar Oct-11-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Aimee L. Steele of AC Transit Legal (510.891.5432) appears as counsel for defendants/moving parties, Erika Owens and AC Transit

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS ERIKA OWENS and AC TRANSIT'S Motion To Dismiss the complaint of plaintiff Carmin Cole is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D302)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-15-2015 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS ERIKA OWENS AND AC TRANSIT'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S CROSS-COMPLAINT is sustained with twenty days leave to amend. No opposition filed. The prevailing party is to provide a form of order and comply with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Irene L. Tofft, CSR #12913. (302/HK)
